title: stelis cavernula
intro: Stelis cavernula, a species of orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine, particularly in the Caribbean, where it is said to possess medicinal properties that can help alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. The roots and leaves of the Stelis cavernula plant are believed to have anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, which can help to loosen mucus and reduce inflammation in the lungs. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that are said to promote healthy respiration and alleviate congestion.
